content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.70%, Bank Nifty -0.78%, India VIX +5.4% to 18.4 — risk-off tone with Brent at $126 driving energy/gold while pressuring autos/metals/realty. IT and Pharma showing relative strength as defensive havens. Book is sitting on +₹6,514 unrealized, mainly from PNBHOUSING and SUNPHARMA — focus is to lock in those gains via tighter SLs rather than chase fresh entries late in a risk-off session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.6% (₹4,392). Current SL 1022 is already above entry. Modest tightening to 1025 (~1.1% below CMP 1036.45, ~0.5% above current SL — meets micro-adjust threshold). Q4 PAT +19% YoY beat, GNPA <1%, MOFSL/MS targets ₹1,160 intact. Keeps ~7% room to ₹1,110 target. Trail-gap discipline maintained: SL is 1.1% below CMP, not flush."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1772.00,
      "new_target": 1840.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.8% (₹1,986), SL already trailed to 1762 (above entry 1734). Tightening to 1772 (~1.6% below CMP 1800) locks ~₹1,140 minimum gain. Stock at upper Bollinger near 52w high ₹1,851; Organon deal financing is real overhang plus Q4 results May 19 binary risk approaching. Tight SL is appropriate. Slightly raised target to ₹1,840 — closer to 52w high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.5% (+₹1,180). SL was at 476 (above entry); tightening to 478 (~0.7% below CMP 481.30) — meets minimum trail-gap and is meaningful tightening (>0.5% from prior SL). Q4 PAT +11%, ₹26.75 FY26 dividend = 5.5% yield, PSU/energy theme intact. Brent $126 supports thermal economics."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "new_target": 215.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock surged +11.26% today on Q4 PAT +68% YoY beat, GNPA improved 140 bps to 3.27%, hit 52w high ₹200.89. From -0.1% earlier, position now +0% but stock has moved decisively above entry intraday. Raise SL from 193 to 195 (entry-protection) — still 1.9% below CMP 198.76, preserves room for normal pullback. Raise target to ₹215 (Emkay TP ₹220, UBS ₹200, MOFSL ₹210 cluster). Brokerage upgrade cascade is the new catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%. Stock failed to hold above ₹300 today despite Brent $126 — APPCB Mori#05 stop-production order and SHP Platform fire are negative HSE overhangs. SL at 296 is 0.8% below CMP 298.60 — already tight, do NOT loosen. Thesis (Brent beneficiary) intact but execution noise creates short-term drag. Hold to SL or target. Q4 results May 2026 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4%. CMP 122.94 still below entry 125.10 but MCX gold +1.79% today on risk-off (Brent $126, VIX +11%). ETF should mark up at next NAV cycle. SL 119 (3.1% below CMP) appropriate for ETF volatility profile. Hold; no tightening warranted given negative P&L."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.9%. Pharma sector defensive in risk-off; Sun Pharma 24% weight catalyst (Organon) intact. SL 22.85 (~4.2% below CMP 23.84) gives room. Position gain too small to trail SL above entry yet (entry 23.65, target +2% trigger would need CMP ≥ 24.12). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ ₹944 placed 419m ago — let it sit; rate-sensitive NBFC may dip into close on risk-off. Do NOT stack another order per ORDER HYGIENE. If it doesn't fill today, will reassess next session."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ ₹1542 placed 479m ago. Letting it work; do not duplicate."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in larger portion of +5.6% gain; SL 1.1% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1772.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten ahead of May 19 Q4 results binary risk; locks ~₹1,140 gain minimum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten by 0.4% to lock more of the +2.5% move while preserving normal volatility room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "reasoning": "Stock +11% intraday on Q4 beat; raise SL above prior pivot to protect entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 296, tight enough. Negative HSE noise; do not over-tighten into normal volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Negative P&L; ETF safe-haven thesis still in play with risk-off + INR weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small gain; SL appropriate; sector defensive thesis intact."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SYNGENE Q4 PAT -3% YoY, FY26 PAT -20%, EBITDA margin compression, CEO transition — explicitly bearish per research. The +11.74% intraday move is short-cover/ramp, NOT sustainable thesis. Avoid. RBLBANK strong Q4 (+234% PAT, GNPA 1.45%) but pending SEBI approval on Emirates NBD deal is binary regulatory event — not a clean entry. BAJAJ-AUTO board meeting May 6 (Q4+dividend+buyback) is a 3-trigger binary — too close to add fresh exposure now per binary-event discipline. PIRAMALFIN Q4 PAT inflated by ₹1,590 cr exceptional gain, P/E 41x vs Bajaj 31x and Shriram 24x — avoid. TATACHEM Q4 board May 4, post Q3 loss — binary event too close, do not chase the +9% pre-result rally. SUNPHARMA Q4 May 19 already in book — no add.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 37%, cash 63% — comfortable buffer in risk-off session with Brent $126, VIX +11%, multiple binary events (BAJAJ-AUTO May 6, TATACHEM May 4, SUNPHARMA May 19). Two pending limits (BAJFINANCE 944, GESHIP 1542) provide ample additional exposure if they fill. Net unrealized +₹6,514 across 7 positions; today's session is about LOCKING gains via tighter SLs on 4 winners (PNBHOUSING, SUNPHARMA, COALINDIA, BANDHANBNK), not adding new risk into a -1.5% Nifty session. Rolling 5-day stats are sobering (13% win rate, profit factor 0.5x, net -₹3,991) — discipline on capital preservation is the right call today. No new entries warranted given (a) risk-off macro, (b) cluster discipline already loaded with banking/financial (PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + RBLBANK pending = financials exposure), (c) multiple watchlist names have binary events within 3-7 sessions."
}
